argument_quality_notes.linguistic: Agent did not debate; provided no candidates.
argument_quality_notes.landscape: Agent did not debate; provided generic but accurate landscape observations.
argument_quality_notes.botanics: Agent did not debate; provided generic but accurate botanical observations.
argument_quality_notes.regulatory: Agent did not debate; provided accurate regulatory observations.

verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a consensus among the high-confidence agents (regulatory and meta) and terminated the process. No pairings were necessary.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the evidence hierarchy (regulatory/meta > landscape/botanics) and the consensus between the high-confidence agents. However, the final prediction was incorrect (USA vs Canada), as the available visual evidence (yellow lines, right-hand traffic) is shared by both countries and insufficient to distinguish them without specific signage or license plates.
